news.title: Public Disclosure Report based on Self-Assessment of RTGS System against the PFMIs – 2025
news.india_relevance: This report assesses the core infrastructure for high-value settlements in the Indian economy.
news.why_it_matters:
It provides a transparent look at the resilience and risk management of India's systemic payment backbone against global standards.
Failure or inefficiency in RTGS could freeze institutional liquidity across the country.

news.title: Rules finalised, rollout of all 4 labour codes likely in April
news.india_relevance: These codes represent the most significant overhaul of India's employment laws in decades.
news.why_it_matters:
Consolidating 29 central laws into four codes will fundamentally change how businesses manage wages, social security, and industrial relations.
It aims to improve ease of doing business while expanding social security to the unorganised sector.

news.title: Explained: How RBI’s safety net to protect falling rupee could mean Rs 4,000 crore shock for banks
news.india_relevance: Directly impacts the profitability and risk exposure of the Indian banking sector during currency volatility.
news.why_it_matters:
Explains the technical friction between RBI’s intervention to stabilize the Rupee and the resulting losses for commercial banks on their FX positions.
This highlights the cost of macro-stability borne by the financial system.

news.title: India to ban Chinese CCTV from Apr 1 as security concerns reshape market - business-standard.com
news.india_relevance: Affects the procurement landscape for security infrastructure across Indian government and private sectors.
news.why_it_matters:
This move forces a massive supply chain pivot toward domestic manufacturers or non-Chinese alternatives.
It aligns with India's broader strategy of reducing technological dependence on 'countries sharing a land border'.

news.title: What changes will RBI’s new rules bring to digital payments from April 1?
news.india_relevance: Affects millions of Indian consumers and the entire fintech ecosystem from the new fiscal year.
news.why_it_matters:
Mandating Two-Factor Authentication (2FA) for all digital transactions is a major shift in the user experience vs. security trade-off.

news.title: JSW Steel: Japan’s JFE Steel Corporation invests Rs 7,875 crore for 25% stake in Kalinga Steel - The Financial Express
news.india_relevance: A major Foreign Direct Investment (FDI) in India's core manufacturing sector.

news.title: ET Explainer: Why land monetisation is emerging as a core funding model for infrastructure
news.india_relevance: Crucial for funding India's massive infrastructure pipeline without further straining the fiscal deficit.
news.why_it_matters:
Explains how public entities like Railways and Ports are unlocking value from idle land to finance new projects.
This shift reduces reliance on budgetary support and introduces private sector efficiency into public asset management.

news.title: TVS overtakes Ola to lead EV FY26 Two-Wheeler market; Bajaj, Ather follow
news.india_relevance: Tracks the competitive evolution of India's transition to electric mobility.

news.title: IBC reforms: Government moves to fix insolvency delays
news.india_relevance: The Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code is the primary mechanism for cleaning up bad loans in India.
news.why_it_matters:
The reforms aim to address the 'judicial bottleneck' that has seen cases drag on for years, eroding asset value.
Faster resolutions will improve credit flow and capital recycling within the Indian economy.

news.title: Bollywood’s golden music age set to enter the public domain as old songs complete copyright term
news.india_relevance: Impacts the valuation of music labels and the creative rights landscape in India.

news.title: What is the World Trade Organization e-commerce moratorium?
